_comment: Macro-Terrain: Cosmic Whale-Back Civilization. Per scale directive: this terrain IS a being. Player shouldn't initially realize they're standing on bone. Divine Sense -> Perception changes -> 'You realize this mountain range... is one finger.' Prime Directive: the being's corpse is objectively terrain; perception tier determines what the player sees.
name: Cosmic Whale-Back Civilization
scale: 100 li across — the back of a cosmic leviathan that swims through the void.
canonical_event: Cosmic whales carry entire civilizations through the void.

perception_tiered_appearance.mortal: A floating continent 100 li across, hovers in the void, surface is starlight.
perception_tiered_appearance.qi_condensation: The continent radiates cosmic-essence; the void around it is calm.
perception_tiered_appearance.foundation_establishment: The continent is the back of a living cosmic whale; the whale swims through void.
perception_tiered_appearance.core_formation: This is a cosmic whale's back; an entire civilization lives on it.
perception_tiered_appearance.nascent_soul: The whale's cosmic-essence sustains the civilization; the whale cultivates by swimming.
perception_tiered_appearance.spirit_severing: The whale and civilization are symbiotic; the civilization feeds the whale cosmic-qi.

perception_mechanic.trigger: When player's perception tier rises, the appearance re-rolls automatically.
perception_mechanic.no_locked_upgrades: A mortal who later reaches Core Formation will see the truth; the terrain does not change, only understanding does.
perception_mechanic.canon_fidelity: This is exactly how Wang Lin perceived Ancient God Tu Si's remains — first as terrain, then as god-bone, then as god-memory.
